name: What evidence do I need for my work injury claim in West Valley?
description: Reports, medical records, witnesses, photos, wages.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for my work injury claim in West Valley?

acceptedAnswer.text: Reports, medical records, witnesses, photos, wages.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Employer/doctor reports (Forms 122/123), medical records, witness statements, photos, wage stubs.[1][2] Prompt reporting helps credibility.[1] Key factors: Prove work-related, timely notice; insurer investigates first 21 days.[2] Practical guidance: Document accident scene, symptoms daily; request all forms copies. Avoid social media posts contradicting injury. Build file before disputes.
